title: The Opening: A Journey Through Surah Al-Fatiha
description: A profound verse-by-verse exploration of the seven oft-repeated verses, uncovering the layers of meaning, mercy, and guidance contained in the opening chapter of the Qur'an.
speaker: Shaykh Ibrahim al-Hakim

title: Mercy to the Worlds: The Early Life of the Prophet ﷺ
description: From the Year of the Elephant to the first revelation in the cave of Hira — an intimate retelling of the Prophet's early years in Makkah and the society that shaped his mission.
speaker: Dr. Yusuf Rahman

title: The Heart of Worship: Understanding Salah
description: Why do we pray? A practical and spiritual guide to transforming the five daily prayers from routine into a living conversation with the Divine.
speaker: Ustadha Maryam Khalil

title: فقه المعاملات: مقدمة في التجارة الإسلامية
description: محاضرة شاملة في أحكام البيوع والمعاملات المالية المعاصرة، مع تطبيقات عملية على التمويل الإسلامي الحديث.
speaker: Shaykh Omar Farooq

title: Forty Hadith of Imam Nawawi: Sincerity of Intention
description: The first hadith — 'Actions are but by intentions' — examined through classical commentary and its application to modern work, worship, and relationships.
speaker: Mufti Hamza Qureshi

title: The Golden Age: Scholars of Baghdad and Cordoba
description: A sweeping journey through the libraries, observatories, and translation houses of the Islamic golden age, and the scholars whose work lit the path for the modern world.
speaker: Dr. Yusuf Rahman

title: Purification of the Heart: Envy and Its Cure
description: Drawing on Imam al-Ghazali and Ibn Qayyim, this lecture diagnoses the disease of envy and prescribes the prophetic remedies that restore contentment to the heart.
speaker: Ustadha Maryam Khalil

title: سورة يوسف: أحسن القصص
description: تدبر في سورة يوسف، قصة الصبر والعفو والتوكل، وكيف تتجلى فيها سنن الله في الابتلاء والتمكين.
speaker: Shaykh Ibrahim al-Hakim

title: Five Minutes Before Fajr: Building a Morning Routine
description: A short, energizing reminder on the blessing of the early morning hours and three small habits that anchor the entire day in remembrance.
speaker: Ustadh Bilal Ahmed

title: صبر کا پھل: حضرت ایوب علیہ السلام کی کہانی
description: حضرت ایوب علیہ السلام کے صبر اور استقامت کا واقعہ، اور آزمائش کے دنوں میں امید قائم رکھنے کے روحانی اسباق۔
speaker: Mufti Hamza Qureshi

title: Fiqh of Fasting: Common Questions Answered
description: A rapid-fire session answering the most frequent questions about fasting — travel, illness, intention, and making up missed days — with evidences from the four schools.
speaker: Shaykh Omar Farooq

title: The Night Journey: Lessons from Al-Isra wal-Mi'raj
description: An evening reflection on the miraculous night journey — the gift of prayer, the meeting of prophets, and what the ascension teaches about hope after hardship.
speaker: Ustadh Bilal Ahmed
